checkpoints.name: gpt-oss-20b-hacked-kl1e3
checkpoints.description: gpt-oss-20b trained with PPO+KL-in-loss (kl=1e-3). Converged to ~95% reward hacking, 0% correctness by step 80. Full 200 steps.

checkpoints.notes: Run killed early after convergence. Checkpoint path not saved — check collaborator's logs.
